messages.author: Random Citizen
messages.text: also a little explanation for "no rx duty cycle in lr1110": no matter how wide I set the "listentime" LR1110 missed packets. the final conclusion was LR1110's duty cycle is handled by the radio's firmware and it was designed for lorawan. it seems it misses the packet if it's mid-preamble when waking up to RX. SX1262 was fine with 8symbolRX, 8symbolSLEEP but I tuned it to listen a little more to be safe. still a huge battery save according to my tests with wio tracker l1
messages.content_html: also a little explanation for "no rx duty cycle in lr1110": no matter how wide I set the "listentime" LR1110 missed packets. the final conclusion was LR1110's duty cycle is handled by the radio's firmware and it was designed for lorawan. it seems it misses the packet if it's mid-preamble when waking up to RX. messages.author: Random Citizen
messages.text: yes all needed features are in, just a few minor tweaks, namely: Dedicated DIO1 work queue Auto AGC reset in rx duty cycle (+RX gain reapply after RX restart, because of this) packet error counting calibrate_image ±2 MHz around the actual frequency RX/TX fallback to STDBY_XOSC (warm crystal, shorter deaf window) RXEN GPIO control when dio2_tx_enable is set All Semtech errata (DS §15) fixes Extension API (needed for eg heltec reg patch, chip busy detection/isreceiving, etc) CAD + LBT (edited)
messages.content_html:
yes all needed features are in, just a few minor tweaks, namely:
  • Dedicated DIO1 work queue
  • Auto AGC reset in rx duty cycle (+RX gain reapply after RX restart, because of this)
  • packet error counting
  • calibrate_image ±2 MHz around the actual frequency
  • RX/TX fallback to STDBY_XOSC (warm crystal, shorter deaf window)
  • RXEN GPIO control when dio2_tx_enable is set
  • All Semtech errata (DS §15) fixes
  • Extension API (needed for eg heltec reg patch, chip busy detection/isreceiving, etc)
  • CAD + LBT
 (edited)
